text.title: Resource Management Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Capacity matrix smoke test
example.note: Roster of 6 engineers, 40h nominal × 80% = 32h available. Subtract PTO 8h, recurring meetings 6h, interruption buffer 4h → 14h project-available per week per person. Demand from WBS = 100h/week → 14h × 6 = 84h supply → 16h overload → propose: delay non-critical T-12 (no scope impact, -16h).
